raw_comment:
1. What do you notice?
I notice that the percentage of players of color in the NBA and WNBA is the same (83%). The League(s) with the highest percentage of players of color are the NBA and the WNBA, while the league with the lowest percentage of players of color is the MLB. In all five of the leagues shown, there is a higher proportion of players of color than there are head coaches of color.
 
2. What do you wonder?
I wonder if we would get results like these with data from other leagues around the world such as the English Premier League, or the CBA. 
  
3. What impact does this have on you and your community?
This shows me that coaching staffs are often not as diverse as the teams themselves. With less diverse coaching staffs, there are not as many people of color in coaching positions to look up to.
 
4. Headline: “Are Sports Really as Diverse as we think?”
ace_sentences: The percentage of players of color in the NBA is 83%.
The percentage of players of color in the WNBA is 83%.
The NBA has the highest percentage of players of color.
The WNBA has the highest percentage of players of color.
The MLB has the lowest percentage of players of color.
In all five of the leagues shown, there is a higher proportion of players of color than there are head coaches of color.
We could get results like these with data from other leagues around the world.
The English Premier League is an other league around the world.
The CBA is an other league around the world.
Coaching staffs are often not as diverse as the teams themselves.
If coaching staffs are less diverse then there are not as many people of color in coaching positions.
With less diverse coaching staffs, there are not as many people of color in coaching positions to look up to.
Are Sports Really as Diverse as we think?
